headline: ConocoPhillips (COP) Valuation Check After Higher Oil Price Assumptions And Middle East Supply Risks
summary: Several major banks recently updated their oil price assumptions following the Iran war and rising uncertainty around the Strait of Hormuz. As a result, ConocoPhillips (COP) is squarely in focus as investors reassess exposure to producers. See our latest analysis for ConocoPhillips. Those higher oil price assumptions have coincided with strong share price momentum for ConocoPhillips, with a 30.3% year to date share price return and a 27.4% total shareholder return over the past year. This...

headline: Exclusive-Qatar's energy boss says he had warned of dangers of provoking Iran
summary: DUBAI, March 20 (Reuters) - As Qatar reels from an Iranian attack that has hobbled its giant natural gas company, its boss, who doubles as the country's energy minister, says he had warned officials and executives of just such a danger should Iran's own sites be hit. "I was always warning, talking to executives from oil ‌and gas that are partnered with us, talking to the U.
